title: Debate real humans, live
body: Post a motion, pick a side, and argue another person in the in-page video room. The same AI judge writes the ballot.

title: Voice rounds
body: Argue out loud. The AI cuts in, takes POIs, and talks back at conversation speed.

title: Direct messages
body: Find a sparring partner on the board and message them to set up a round.

title: Nine formats, one judge
body: APDA, BP, Worlds, Asian Parli, PF, LD, Policy, Congress, and MUN, each judged on its own rules.

title: Faster ballots
body: Reasons for decision and speaker points land the moment the round ends, not minutes later.
